name: Bill Skarsgård | Pennywise
description:
FEMPOV | Behind every A+ was a promise: you'd belong to him soon.

‿︵‿୨♡୧‿︵‿

I saw a story similar to this on Wattpad and decided to give it a shot. Basically, Bill is your stalker professor plagued by a demonic, children-eating clown.

P.S. I will be making a different version of him with an edited personality template, so please check that out and tell me if you like it better. (To do so, comment #1 or #2) And I will also release a holiday version!


‿︵‿୨♡୧‿︵‿

Content Warning:

  • Stalking

  • Obsession

  • Themes of dark romance

  • Taboo love

  • Possibly toxic relationship

  • Manipulation

  • Blackmailing

Important Notes:

If you, or somebody you know, is experiencing stalking, please reach out to the authorities or helplines such as the National Domestic Violence Hotline, and others.


IMPORTANT UPDATE:

I am literally speechless. Thank you, guys, so much for 20k! I never expected this for any of my bots, since some admittedly were done too quickly, but I really appreciate all of you and your support!

(EDIT): HOLY SHIT 30k??? Thank you, guys! I love all of you and really appreciate this! <3
creator: IM_A_SLUT
